{"id":"project-LICHEN-a91l","title":"TUI action_quit may leave simulator state inconsistent","description":"File: python/src/lichen/tui/app.py
Lines: 280-285

The action_quit method doesn't properly notify the simulator of disconnection:

    async def action_quit(self) -> None:
        if self._receive_task is not None:
            self._receive_task.cancel()
        self._disconnect_sync()  # Just sets _radio = None
        self.exit()

When a node disconnects from the simulator without sending a proper disconnect message, the simulator may:
1. Continue routing packets to the disconnected node
2. Keep the node in its neighbor tables
3. Waste resources on the phantom node until timeout

The async _disconnect method (line 360-380) properly calls await self._radio.close(), but _disconnect_sync doesn't.

Impact: Simulator state inconsistency, potential for stale routing entries.

Fix: Either await the proper disconnect in action_quit, or ensure SimRadio.close() sends a disconnect notification in its __del__ method.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:29:31.522219Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:29:31.522253Z"}
